dataset: AIRED instruction->implementation pairs (v3: per-file pairs with file-scoped instructions)
format: JSONL {messages:[{user},{assistant}]}; user=file-scoped instruction, assistant=that file's unified diff
method: Large PR/commit diffs split per file/hunk; each fragment given an instruction scoped to that file's change by review; fragments only meaningful as part of the whole were dropped. Whole units <=150L kept with full description.
